text: The word<S>1697</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> that came to Joel<S>3100</S> the son<S>1121</S> of Pethuel<S>6602</S>.

Hear<S>8085</S> this<S>2205</S>, ye old men, and give ear<S>238</S>, all ye inhabitants<S>3427</S> of the land<S>776</S>. Hath this been in your days<S>3117</S>, or in<S>518</S> the days<S>3117</S> of your fathers<S>1</S>?
Tell<S>5608</S> ye your children<S>1121</S> of it<S>1121</S>, and let your children tell their children<S>1121</S>, and their children<S>1121</S> another<S>312</S> generation<S>1755</S>.

That which the palmer-worm<S>1501</S> hath left<S>3499</S> hath the locust<S>697</S> eaten<S>398</S>; and that which the locust<S>697</S> hath left<S>3499</S> hath the canker-worm<S>3218</S> eaten<S>398</S>; and that which the canker-worm<S>3218</S> hath left<S>3499</S> hath the caterpillar<S>2625</S> eaten<S>398</S>.

Awake<S>6974</S>, ye drunkards<S>7910</S>, and weep<S>1058</S>; and wail<S>3213</S>, all ye drinkers<S>8354</S> of wine<S>3196</S>, because of the sweet wine<S>6071</S>; for it is cut off<S>3772</S> from your mouth<S>6310</S>.

For a nation<S>1471</S> is come up<S>5927</S> upon my land<S>776</S>, strong<S>6099</S>, and without number<S>4557</S>; his teeth<S>8127</S> are the teeth<S>8127</S> of a lion<S>738</S>, and he hath the jaw-teeth<S>4973</S> of a lioness<S>3833</S>.

He hath laid<S>7760</S> my vine<S>1612</S> waste<S>8047</S>, and barked<S>7111</S> my fig-tree<S>8384</S>: he hath made it clean<S>2834</S> bare<S>2834</S>, and cast it away<S>7993</S>; the branches<S>8299</S> thereof are made white<S>3835</S>.
Lament<S>421</S> like a virgin<S>1330</S> girded<S>2296</S> with sackcloth<S>8242</S> for the husband<S>1167</S> of her youth<S>5271</S>.

The meal-offering<S>4503</S> and the drink-offering<S>5262</S> are cut off<S>3772</S> from the house<S>1004</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S>; the priests<S>3548</S>, Jehovah<S>3068</S>'s ministers<S>8334</S>, mourn<S>56</S>.

The field<S>7704</S> is laid waste<S>7703</S>, the land<S>127</S> mourneth<S>56</S>; for the grain<S>1715</S> is destroyed<S>7703</S>, the new wine<S>8492</S> is dried up<S>3001</S>, the oil<S>3323</S> languisheth<S>535</S>.

Be confounded<S>3001</S>, O ye husbandmen<S>406</S>, wail<S>3213</S>, O ye vinedressers<S>3755</S>, for the wheat<S>2406</S> and for the barley<S>8184</S>; for the harvest<S>7105</S> of the field<S>7704</S> is perished<S>6</S>.

The vine<S>1612</S> is withered<S>3001</S>, and the fig-tree<S>8558</S> languisheth<S>535</S>; the pomegranate-tree<S>8384</S>, the palm-tree<S>8598</S> also<S>8598</S>, and the apple-tree, even all the trees<S>8558</S> of the field<S>7704</S> are withered<S>3001</S>: for joy<S>8342</S> is withered away<S>3001</S> from the sons<S>1121</S> of men<S>120</S>.

Gird<S>2296</S> yourselves with sackcloth<S>5594</S>, and lament, ye priests<S>3548</S>; wail<S>3213</S>, ye ministers<S>8334</S> of the altar<S>4196</S>; come<S>935</S>, lie all night<S>3885</S> in sackcloth<S>8242</S>, ye ministers<S>8334</S> of my God<S>430</S>: for the meal-offering<S>4503</S> and the drink-offering<S>5262</S> are withholden<S>4513</S> from the house<S>1004</S> of your God<S>430</S>.

Sanctify<S>6942</S> a fast<S>6685</S>, call<S>7121</S> a solemn assembly<S>6116</S>, gather<S>622</S> the old men<S>2205</S> and all the inhabitants<S>3427</S> of the land<S>776</S> unto the house<S>1004</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> your God<S>430</S>, and cry<S>2199</S> unto Jehovah<S>3068</S>.
Alas<S>162</S> for the day<S>3117</S>! for the day<S>3117</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> is at hand<S>7138</S>, and as destruction<S>7701</S> from the Almighty<S>7706</S> shall it come<S>935</S>.
Is not the food<S>400</S> cut off<S>3772</S> before our eyes<S>5869</S>, yea<S>8057</S>, joy and gladness<S>1524</S> from the house<S>1004</S> of our God<S>430</S>?

The seeds<S>6507</S> rot<S>5685</S> under their clods<S>4053</S>; the garners<S>214</S> are laid desolate<S>8074</S>, the barns<S>4460</S> are broken down<S>2040</S>; for the grain<S>1715</S> is withered<S>3001</S>.

How do the beasts<S>929</S> groan<S>584</S>! the herds<S>5739</S> of cattle<S>1241</S> are perplexed<S>943</S>, because they have no pasture<S>4829</S>; yea<S>5739</S>, the flocks of sheep<S>6629</S> are made desolate<S>816</S>.

O Jehovah<S>3068</S>, to thee do I cry<S>7121</S>; for the fire<S>784</S> hath devoured<S>398</S> the pastures<S>4999</S> of the wilderness<S>4057</S>, and the flame<S>3852</S> hath burned<S>3857</S> all the trees<S>6086</S> of the field<S>7704</S>.

Yea<S>929</S>, the beasts of the field<S>7704</S> pant<S>6165</S> unto thee<S>4325</S>; for the water brooks<S>650</S> are dried up<S>3001</S>, and the fire<S>784</S> hath devoured<S>398</S> the pastures<S>4999</S> of the wilderness<S>4057</S>.

Blow<S>8628</S> ye the trumpet<S>7782</S> in Zion<S>6726</S>, and sound an alarm<S>7321</S> in my holy<S>6944</S> mountain<S>2022</S>; let all the inhabitants<S>3427</S> of the land<S>776</S> tremble<S>7264</S>: for the day<S>3117</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> cometh<S>935</S>, for it is nigh at hand<S>7138</S>;

a day<S>3117</S> of darkness<S>2822</S> and gloominess<S>653</S>, a day<S>3117</S> of clouds<S>6051</S> and thick darkness<S>6205</S>, as the dawn<S>7837</S> spread<S>6566</S> upon the mountains<S>2022</S>; a great<S>7227</S> people<S>5971</S> and a strong<S>6099</S>; there hath not been<S>1961</S> ever<S>5769</S> the like<S>3254</S>, neither shall be any more after<S>310</S> them<S>8141</S>, even to the years of many<S>1755</S> generations<S>1755</S>.

A fire<S>784</S> devoureth<S>398</S> before<S>6440</S> them<S>310</S>; and behind them a flame<S>3852</S> burneth<S>3857</S>: the land<S>776</S> is as the garden<S>1588</S> of Eden<S>5731</S> before<S>6440</S> them<S>310</S>, and behind them a desolate<S>8077</S> wilderness<S>4057</S>; yea<S>6413</S>, and none hath escaped them.
The appearance<S>4758</S> of them is as the appearance<S>4758</S> of horses<S>5483</S>; and as horsemen<S>6571</S>, so do they run<S>7323</S>.

Like the noise<S>6963</S> of chariots<S>4818</S> on the tops<S>7218</S> of the mountains<S>2022</S> do they leap<S>7540</S>, like the noise<S>6963</S> of a flame<S>3851</S> of fire<S>784</S> that devoureth<S>398</S> the stubble<S>7179</S>, as a strong<S>6099</S> people<S>5971</S> set in battle<S>4421</S> array<S>6186</S>.
At their presence<S>6440</S> the peoples<S>5971</S> are in anguish<S>2342</S>; all faces<S>6440</S> are waxed<S>6908</S> pale<S>6289</S>.

They run<S>7323</S> like mighty men<S>1368</S>; they climb<S>5927</S> the wall<S>2346</S> like men<S>582</S> of war<S>4421</S>; and they march<S>3212</S> every one<S>376</S> on his ways<S>1870</S>, and they break<S>5670</S> not their ranks<S>734</S>.

Neither doth one<S>376</S> thrust<S>1766</S> another<S>251</S>; they march<S>3212</S> every one<S>1397</S> in his path<S>4546</S>; and they burst through<S>5307</S> the weapons<S>7973</S>, and break not off their course<S>1214</S>.

They leap<S>8264</S> upon the city<S>5892</S>; they run<S>7323</S> upon the wall<S>2346</S>; they climb up<S>5927</S> into the houses<S>1004</S>; they enter in<S>935</S> at the windows<S>2474</S> like a thief<S>1590</S>.

The earth<S>776</S> quaketh<S>7264</S> before<S>6440</S> them<S>8064</S>; the heavens tremble<S>7493</S>; the sun<S>8121</S> and the moon<S>3394</S> are darkened<S>6937</S>, and the stars<S>3556</S> withdraw<S>622</S> their shining<S>5051</S>.

And Jehovah<S>3068</S> uttereth<S>5414</S> his voice<S>6963</S> before<S>6440</S> his army<S>2428</S>; for his camp<S>4264</S> is very<S>3966</S> great<S>7227</S>; for he is strong<S>6099</S> that executeth<S>6213</S> his word<S>1697</S>; for the day<S>3117</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> is great<S>1419</S> and very<S>3966</S> terrible<S>3372</S>; and who can abide it<S>3557</S>?
Yet even now<S>5002</S>, saith Jehovah<S>3068</S>, turn<S>7725</S> ye unto me with all your heart<S>3824</S>, and with fasting<S>6685</S>, and with weeping<S>1065</S>, and with mourning<S>4553</S>:

and rend<S>7167</S> your heart<S>3824</S>, and not your garments<S>899</S>, and turn<S>7725</S> unto Jehovah<S>3068</S> your God<S>430</S>; for he is gracious<S>2587</S> and merciful<S>7349</S>, slow<S>750</S> to anger<S>639</S>, and abundant<S>7227</S> in lovingkindness<S>2617</S>, and repenteth<S>5162</S> him of the evil<S>7451</S>.

Who knoweth<S>3045</S> whether he will not turn<S>7725</S> and repent<S>5162</S>, and leave<S>7604</S> a blessing<S>1293</S> behind<S>310</S> him<S>4503</S>, even a meal-offering and a drink-offering<S>5262</S> unto Jehovah<S>3068</S> your God<S>430</S>?
Blow<S>8628</S> the trumpet<S>7782</S> in Zion<S>6726</S>, sanctify<S>6942</S> a fast<S>6685</S>, call<S>7121</S> a solemn assembly<S>6116</S>;

gather<S>622</S> the people<S>5971</S>, sanctify<S>6942</S> the assembly<S>6951</S>, assemble<S>6908</S> the old<S>2205</S> men<S>622</S>, gather the children<S>5768</S>, and those that suck<S>3243</S> the breasts<S>7699</S>; let the bridegroom<S>2860</S> go forth<S>3318</S> from his chamber<S>2315</S>, and the bride<S>3618</S> out of her closet<S>2646</S>.

Let the priests<S>3548</S>, the ministers<S>8334</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S>, weep<S>1058</S> between the porch<S>197</S> and the altar<S>4196</S>, and let them say<S>559</S>, Spare<S>2347</S> thy people<S>5971</S>, O Jehovah<S>3068</S>, and give<S>5414</S> not thy heritage<S>5159</S> to reproach<S>2781</S>, that the nations<S>1471</S> should rule over<S>4910</S> them<S>559</S>: wherefore should they say among the peoples<S>5971</S>, Where is their God<S>430</S>?
Then was Jehovah<S>3068</S> jealous<S>7065</S> for his land<S>776</S>, and had pity<S>2550</S> on his people<S>5971</S>.

And Jehovah<S>3068</S> answered<S>6030</S> and said<S>559</S> unto his people<S>5971</S>, Behold<S>7971</S>, I will send you grain<S>1715</S>, and new wine<S>8492</S>, and oil<S>3323</S>, and ye shall be satisfied<S>7646</S> therewith<S>5414</S>; and I will no more make you a reproach<S>2781</S> among the nations<S>1471</S>;

but I will remove far off<S>7368</S> from you the northern<S>6830</S> army<S>5080</S>, and will drive it into a land<S>776</S> barren<S>6723</S> and desolate<S>8077</S>, its forepart<S>6440</S> into the eastern<S>6931</S> sea<S>3220</S>, and its hinder part<S>5490</S> into the western<S>314</S> sea<S>3220</S>; and its stench<S>889</S> shall come up<S>5927</S>, and its ill savor<S>6709</S> shall come up<S>5927</S>, because it hath done<S>6213</S> great things<S>1431</S>.
Fear<S>3372</S> not<S>127</S>, O land, be glad<S>1523</S> and rejoice<S>8055</S>; for Jehovah<S>3068</S> hath done<S>6213</S> great things<S>1431</S>.

Be not afraid<S>3372</S>, ye beasts<S>929</S> of the field<S>7704</S>; for the pastures<S>4999</S> of the wilderness<S>4057</S> do spring<S>1876</S>, for the tree<S>6086</S> beareth<S>5375</S> its fruit<S>6529</S>, the fig-tree<S>8384</S> and the vine<S>1612</S> do yield<S>5414</S> their strength<S>2428</S>.

Be glad<S>1523</S> then<S>1121</S>, ye children of Zion<S>6726</S>, and rejoice<S>8055</S> in Jehovah<S>3068</S> your God<S>430</S>; for he giveth<S>5414</S> you the former rain<S>4175</S> in just measure<S>6666</S>, and he causeth to come down<S>3381</S> for you the rain<S>1653</S>, the former rain<S>4175</S> and the latter rain<S>4456</S>, in the first month<S>7223</S>.
And the floors<S>1637</S> shall be full<S>4390</S> of wheat<S>1250</S>, and the vats<S>3342</S> shall overflow<S>7783</S> with new wine<S>8492</S> and oil<S>3323</S>.

And I will restore<S>7999</S> to you the years<S>8141</S> that the locust<S>697</S> hath eaten<S>398</S>, the canker-worm<S>3218</S>, and the caterpillar<S>2625</S>, and the palmer-worm<S>1501</S>, my great<S>1419</S> army<S>2428</S> which I sent among you<S>7971</S>.

And ye shall eat<S>398</S> in plenty<S>398</S> and be satisfied<S>7646</S>, and shall praise<S>1984</S> the name<S>8034</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> your God<S>430</S>, that hath dealt<S>6213</S> wondrously<S>6381</S> with you<S>5971</S>; and my people shall never<S>5769</S> be put to shame<S>954</S>.

And ye shall know<S>3045</S> that I am in the midst<S>7130</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>, and that I am Jehovah<S>3068</S> your God<S>430</S>, and there is none else<S>5971</S>; and my people shall never<S>5769</S> be put to shame<S>954</S>.

And it shall come to pass afterward<S>310</S>, that I will pour out<S>8210</S> my Spirit<S>7307</S> upon all flesh<S>1320</S>; and your sons<S>1121</S> and your daughters<S>1323</S> shall prophesy<S>5012</S>, your old men<S>2205</S> shall dream<S>2492</S> dreams<S>2472</S>, your young men<S>970</S> shall see<S>7200</S> visions<S>2384</S>:
and also upon the servants<S>5650</S> and upon the handmaids<S>8198</S> in those days<S>3117</S> will I pour out<S>8210</S> my Spirit<S>7307</S>.
And I will show<S>5414</S> wonders<S>4159</S> in the heavens<S>8064</S> and in the earth<S>776</S>: blood<S>1818</S>, and fire<S>784</S>, and pillars<S>8490</S> of smoke<S>6227</S>.

The sun<S>8121</S> shall be turned<S>2015</S> into darkness<S>2822</S>, and the moon<S>3394</S> into blood<S>1818</S>, before<S>6440</S> the great<S>1419</S> and terrible<S>3372</S> day<S>3117</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> cometh<S>935</S>.

And it shall come to pass<S>7121</S>, that whosoever shall call on the name<S>8034</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> shall be delivered<S>4422</S>; for in mount<S>2022</S> Zion<S>6726</S> and in Jerusalem<S>3389</S> there shall be those that escape<S>6413</S>, as Jehovah<S>3068</S> hath said<S>559</S>, and among the remnant<S>8300</S> those whom Jehovah<S>3068</S> doth call<S>7121</S>.
For<S>3117</S>, behold, in those days, and in that time<S>6256</S>, when I shall bring back<S>7725</S> the captivity<S>7622</S> of Judah<S>3063</S> and Jerusalem<S>3389</S>,

I will gather<S>6908</S> all nations<S>1471</S>, and will bring them down<S>3381</S> into the valley<S>6010</S> of Jehoshaphat<S>3092</S>; and I will execute judgment<S>8199</S> upon them there for my people<S>5971</S> and for my heritage<S>5159</S> Israel<S>3478</S>, whom they have scattered<S>6340</S> among the nations<S>1471</S>: and they have parted<S>2505</S> my land<S>776</S>,

and have cast<S>3032</S> lots<S>1486</S> for my people<S>5971</S>, and have given<S>5414</S> a boy<S>3206</S> for a harlot<S>2181</S>, and sold<S>4376</S> a girl<S>3207</S> for wine<S>3196</S>, that they may drink<S>8354</S>.

Yea<S>6865</S>, and what are ye to me, O Tyre, and Sidon<S>6721</S>, and all the regions<S>1552</S> of Philistia<S>6429</S>? will ye render<S>7999</S> me a recompense<S>1576</S>? and if ye recompense<S>1580</S> me<S>7031</S>, swiftly and speedily<S>4120</S> will I return<S>7725</S> your recompense<S>1576</S> upon your own head<S>7218</S>.
Forasmuch as ye have taken<S>3947</S> my silver<S>3701</S> and my gold<S>2091</S>, and have carried<S>935</S> into your temples<S>1964</S> my goodly<S>2896</S> precious things<S>4261</S>,

and have sold<S>4376</S> the children<S>1121</S> of Judah<S>3063</S> and the children<S>1121</S> of Jerusalem<S>3389</S> unto the sons of the Grecians<S>3125</S>, that ye may remove them far<S>7368</S> from their border<S>1366</S>;

and I will sell<S>4376</S> your sons<S>1121</S> and your daughters<S>1323</S> into the hand<S>3027</S> of the children<S>1121</S> of Judah<S>3063</S>, and they shall sell<S>4376</S> them to the men of Sheba<S>7615</S>, to a nation<S>1471</S> far off<S>7350</S>: for Jehovah<S>3068</S> hath spoken it<S>1696</S>.

Proclaim<S>7121</S> ye this among the nations<S>1471</S>; prepare<S>6942</S> war<S>4421</S>; stir up<S>5782</S> the mighty men<S>1368</S>; let all the men<S>582</S> of war<S>4421</S> draw near<S>5066</S>, let them come up<S>5927</S>.
Beat<S>3807</S> your plowshares<S>855</S> into swords<S>2719</S>, and your pruning-hooks<S>4211</S> into spears<S>7420</S>: let the weak<S>2523</S> say<S>559</S>, I am strong<S>1368</S>.

Haste<S>5789</S> ye<S>935</S>, and come, all ye nations<S>1471</S> round about<S>6908</S>, and gather yourselves together: thither<S>5439</S> cause thy mighty ones<S>1368</S> to come down<S>5181</S>, O Jehovah<S>3068</S>.

Let the nations<S>1471</S> bestir<S>5782</S> themselves<S>5927</S>, and come up to the valley<S>6010</S> of Jehoshaphat<S>3092</S>; for there will I sit<S>3427</S> to judge<S>8199</S> all the nations<S>1471</S> round about<S>5439</S>.

Put<S>7971</S> ye in the sickle<S>4038</S>; for the harvest<S>7105</S> is ripe<S>1310</S>: come<S>935</S>, tread<S>3381</S> ye<S>1660</S>; for the winepress is full<S>4390</S>, the vats<S>3342</S> overflow<S>7783</S>; for their wickedness<S>7451</S> is great<S>7227</S>.

Multitudes<S>1995</S>, multitudes<S>1995</S> in the valley<S>6010</S> of decision<S>2742</S>! for the day<S>3117</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> is near<S>7138</S> in the valley<S>6010</S> of decision<S>2742</S>.
The sun<S>8121</S> and the moon<S>3394</S> are darkened<S>6937</S>, and the stars<S>3556</S> withdraw<S>622</S> their shining<S>5051</S>.

And Jehovah<S>3068</S> will roar<S>7580</S> from Zion<S>6726</S>, and utter<S>5414</S> his voice<S>6963</S> from Jerusalem<S>3389</S>; and the heavens<S>8064</S> and the earth<S>776</S> shall shake<S>7493</S>: but Jehovah<S>3068</S> will be a refuge<S>4268</S> unto his people<S>5971</S>, and a stronghold<S>4581</S> to the children<S>1121</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>.
